_meta.differentiation_note: This vertical is CNC PRECISION MACHINING (turning, milling, EDM, grinding, multi-axis). Welding/structural steel is W3A. Pure-machinework shops are W3D.
sources_used: WebSearch (Google) for per-metro queries (Houston / DFW / Austin / San Antonio / East TX corridors)
Per-business WebFetch of homepage / about / capabilities pages
NTMA North Texas Chapter member directory (ntmanorthtexas.org) — 27 members
Thomasnet supplier search for Swiss screw / aerospace CNC by region
Industry trade press references (Production Machining, PMPA, NTMA)
sources_blocked: maddoxmetalworks.com (expired TLS certificate — verified via LinkedIn / yellowpages instead)
decaturms.com (Contact Support page only — see acquired status note)
Several SEO-driven shop pages (Roberson Tool, RAM Tool, Distinctive Mfg, Hastreiter, J&J Machine, FTC) that list TX cities but operate from MI/WI/CA HQs — these were filtered out, not included
geographies_covered: Brazos (Caldwell, Navasota) — central TX rural job shops
Montgomery (Conroe, New Waverly, The Woodlands) — N Houston manufacturing corridor
Tyler county (Woodville) — East TX pump repair
Travis/Williamson (Austin, Pflugerville, Round Rock, Hutto, Spicewood) — semicon + medical
Bexar (San Antonio, Converse) — aerospace / defense / Swiss screw
Dallas (Dallas, Carrollton, Garland, Richardson) — DFW industrial
Tarrant (Fort Worth, Arlington) — Lockheed/Bell aerospace corridor
Collin (Farmersville, Plano, Frisco — adjacent) — DFW aerospace
Denton (Denton, Lewisville, Krum, Ponder) — aerospace / N-DFW
Wise (Decatur — but verified anchor is PE-owned, so excluded)
exclusion_brands_excluded_from_spine: Knust-Godwin LLC, Katy — owned by SBO AG (Austrian public co.)
Mayday Manufacturing, Lewisville/Denton — acquired by ESCO Technologies (NYSE: ESE) in 2016 (public)
Applegate EDM, Dallas — owned by Precision Aerospace Holdings (PE roll-up)
Decatur Machine Services, Decatur — acquired by Precision Aerospace Holdings July 2023 (PE roll-up)
Mills Machine — Mills Machine Co. is Shawnee OK; the TX Mills Machine Shop Operating Services in Ponder is small/independent (kept)
Cox Manufacturing, San Antonio — 200 employees, 2.4M parts/week, clear >$30M scale
Shamrock Precision — TX + Malaysia facilities, not Texas-only-independent
Fathom Manufacturing (parent of Centex Machining, Round Rock) — multi-state PE roll-up
Texas Contract Manufacturing Group (TCMG), Austin — multi-subsidiary group
Continental NH3 Products parent of Continental Manufacturing, Dallas — confirmed family-owned 3rd-gen but flagged for size check; KEPT pending
Sunbelt Machine Works / SLT Machine Works, Stafford (13411 Redfish Ln) — acquired by Shumate Industries (Rigzone 2007), now a corp subsidiary
Cox Manufacturing, San Antonio — 200 employees, 2.4M parts/wk = >>$30M (already listed above; reiterated here)
_meta.verification_methodology: Each row verified by WebFetch of the business's primary website confirming legal name, contact, Texas address, and at least one of: founding year, family/independent ownership status, or industry/cert mix. Out-of-TX HQs (e.g. Owens Industries Wisconsin, Distinctive Mfg Michigan, J&J Machine Michigan, RAM Tool Wisconsin, Hastreiter Wisconsin, AT Precision Illinois, American Precision Tool California, Blanda Minnesota, C. Thorrez Michigan, Texas Machining NC) were filtered out — they list TX cities as service areas but do not have a Texas job shop. Where founding year, employee count, or cert status was not explicitly stated by the business itself, the field is null rather than fabricated.
out_of_scope_filtered: Welding-first or structural-steel-first shops (those are W3A, not W3D)
Pure waterjet/laser/fabrication shops with no CNC turning/milling spine
Mold/die-only shops with no machining-job-shop offering
Calibration/inspection-only firms (e.g., Greenslade and Co. — fastener gaging only)
Aluminum extrusion + secondary fabrication only (e.g., Mann Made Industries)
Crane / heavy equipment OEM with secondary machine shop (e.g., Mitchell Crane — primary biz is cranes)
